tests: const app = createApp(); const server = app.listen(3070); const loginRes = await fetch('http://localhost:3070/login', { method: 'POST' }); const cookie = loginRes.headers.get('set-cookie'); const meRes = await fetch('http://localhost:3070/me', { headers: { Cookie: cookie } }); const json = await meRes.json(); await new Promise((r) => server.close(r)); expect(json.user).toBe('alice');

const app2 = createApp(); const server2 = app2.listen(3071); const meRes2 = await fetch('http://localhost:3071/me'); const json2 = await meRes2.json(); await new Promise((r) => server2.close(r)); expect(json2.user).toBeNull();
